case_title: STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPT. vs. LATIF, ABDUL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATIF, ABDUL $1,459.86 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,539.86
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LATIF, ABDUL
REIMBURSEMENT FILING FEES. DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT
SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LATIF, ABDUL
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EMPLOYMENT DEVELOPMENT DEPARTMENT AS TO DEFENDANT LATIF, ABDUL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,643.04 AS TO DEFENDANT LATIF, ABDUL
